tests.name: Login with empty username and valid password
tests.description: Attempt to login leaving the username field empty but providing a valid password. Expects login to fail or show an error.

tests.name: Login with valid username and empty password
tests.description: Attempt to login with a valid username but leaving the password field empty. Expects login to fail or show an error.

tests.name: Successful Login and Dashboard verification
tests.description: Login with valid credentials and verify the dashboard loads correctly with user info and financial data.

tests.name: Dashboard tab navigation - Accounts tab
tests.description: Navigate to the Accounts tab from the Dashboard using the bottom tab bar.

tests.name: Dashboard tab navigation - Cards tab
tests.description: Navigate to the Cards tab from the Dashboard using the bottom tab bar.

tests.name: Dashboard tab navigation - Spends tab
tests.description: Navigate to the Spends tab from the Dashboard using the bottom tab bar.

tests.name: Dashboard carousel swipe and BOOK FD interaction
tests.description: Verify carousel content and tap BOOK FD button on the dashboard.

tests.name: Dashboard Accounts Summary display verification
tests.description: Verify accounts summary tile shows correct balance and number of accounts.

tests.name: Navigate to Notifications screen and verify ACCOUNT tab
tests.description: Open notifications from the navbar and verify Account notifications are shown.

tests.name: Switch to OFFERS & UPDATES notification tab
tests.description: Switch to the OFFERS & UPDATES tab on the Notifications screen.

tests.name: View Profile screen and verify user details
tests.description: Navigate to the Profile screen and verify all user profile information is displayed correctly.

tests.name: Logout flow - Cancel logout via NO button
tests.description: Initiate logout from Profile screen and cancel by tapping NO in the confirmation dialog.

tests.name: Logout flow - Confirm logout via YES button
tests.description: Initiate logout from Profile screen and confirm by tapping YES in the confirmation dialog.

tests.name: Logout dialog close via X button
tests.description: Open the logout dialog and close it using the close (X) button.

tests.name: Login screen - Register as new user button
tests.description: Verify the REGISTER AS NEW USER button is visible on the login screen and tap it.

tests.name: Login with empty username and empty password
tests.description: Attempt to login with both username and password fields empty. Expects login to fail.

tests.name: Dashboard - Total Investments display verification
tests.description: Verify Total Investments amount is shown correctly on the dashboard.

tests.name: Notifications screen - Navigate back to Dashboard
tests.description: From the Notifications screen, tap the Dashboard tab to return to Dashboard.
